vocab.example: The constant intellectual stimulation I receive from discussing abstract theories is definitely the highlight of my course.
It is incredibly satisfying to see the practical application of complex mathematical models in real-world engineering projects.

vocab.meaning: quá trình học hỏi nhanh và thử thách
vocab.example: Although there is a steep learning curve, mastering new software for data analysis is the most rewarding part of my studies.

vocab.meaning: chiều sâu về chủ đề/nội dung
vocab.example: I was drawn to this major because of its thematic depth, allowing me to explore the nuances of human behavior.
The lectures on behavioral economics always pique my interest as they reveal the hidden motives behind our daily choices.

vocab.meaning: sự cộng tác với bạn bè cùng trang lứa
vocab.example: Through peer collaboration in our group projects, I’ve learned how to integrate diverse perspectives into a cohesive solution.
The most fascinating aspect of my research is gathering empirical evidence to either support or debunk long-standing myths.

vocab.meaning: sự thay đổi về tư duy/mô thức
vocab.example: Studying environmental science caused a complete paradigm shift in how I perceive the impact of consumerism.

vocab.meaning: khung phân tích/hệ thống phân tích
vocab.example: I love that my studies provide me with a robust analytical framework to evaluate current global political events.

vocab.meaning: khám phá/giải mã những bí ẩn của
vocab.example: Being able to unravel the mysteries of the human brain through neurobiology is what keeps me motivated every day.
